creator: milios@ccsys.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #12)

To atone for my sin of probably being the one to blame for slowing this down a couple years ago, I'll take this on and submit a patch ASAP. This weekend or the next; i don't track HEAD or doc right now. I'm currently a graybeard on the legacy (releng/13.3) track. Seems about as straightforward as can be, though. (famous last words)
